title: leontodon runcinatus
intro: Leontodon runcinatus, also known as sharp-leaved hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family with a bitter and astringent taste. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Leontodon runcinatus include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate rheumatic pain. In herbal preparations, Leontodon runcinatus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various ailments.
